indicators.name: large windows with view of sky
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to enter, which can be disruptive to sleep.

indicators.name: dark floor
indicators.rationale: Dark flooring can make it difficult to see in the dark, potentially causing accidents.

indicators.name: no furniture or bedding
indicators.rationale: No furniture or bedding indicates no place to rest or sleep.

reasoning_summary: The large windows and dark floor make this space less suitable for sleep. The absence of furniture or bedding further undermines the potential for sleep.
